BobaShopGUI - Class in com.team81
Main GUI application for the Team 81 Boba Shop Point-of-Sale (POS) system.
BobaShopGUI() - Constructor for class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Constructs the main Boba Shop POS window.
BobaShopGUI.CartItem - Class in com.team81
Represents a single item in the shopping cart with a name, unit price, and quantity.
buildCashierView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds the cashier order entry view panel.
buildEmployeeManagerView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds the employee manager view panel for adding, updating, toggling, and deleting employee records.
buildInventoryManagerView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds the inventory manager view panel for adding, updating, and deleting inventory items with stock levels and reorder thresholds.
buildMenuManagerView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds the menu manager view panel for adding, updating, deleting, toggling, and managing ingredients of menu items.
buildReportsView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds the reporting view panel with controls for generating X-Reports, Z-Reports, product usage charts, and sales reports for specified time windows.
buildSidebar(String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds the navigation sidebar panel with buttons for each application view.
buildTrendsCard(String, String, DefaultTableModel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Creates a card panel containing a titled table populated from a SQL query.
buildTrendsView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds the ordering trends view panel showing hourly order volume and recent daily sales in side-by-side tables with a refresh button.
BUTTON_FONT - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
 
=======
Adds a menu item to the cart.

B

BG_LIGHT - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Light background colour for content panels.
BLUE_DARK - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Darker blue used for hover/pressed states of blue buttons.
BLUE_PRIMARY - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Primary blue colour used for secondary action buttons.
BobaShopGUI - Class in com.team81
Main GUI application for the Team 81 Boba Shop Point-of-Sale (POS) system.
BobaShopGUI() - Constructor for class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Constructs the main POS window, initialises the database connection, builds all view panels (cashier, trends, reports, menu manager, inventory manager, employee manager), and displays the cashier view.
BobaShopGUI.CartItem - Class in com.team81
Simple data holder representing a single item in the cashier's shopping cart.
buildCashierView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds and returns the cashier order view panel.
buildEmployeeManagerView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds and returns the employee manager view panel, which provides a table of all employees and buttons to add, update, toggle enabled status, and delete employee records.
buildInventoryManagerView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds and returns the inventory manager view panel, which provides a table of all inventory items and buttons to add, update, and delete inventory records.
buildMenuManagerView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds and returns the menu manager view panel, which provides a table of all menu items and buttons to add, update, delete, toggle enabled status, and manage recipe ingredients.
buildReportsView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds and returns the reports view panel.
buildSidebar(String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds a vertical sidebar navigation panel with buttons for each major view in the application.
buildTrendsCard(String, String, DefaultTableModel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Creates a card panel containing a titled table whose rows are populated by running the specified SQL query.
buildTrendsView() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Builds and returns the manager trends view panel.
BUTTON_FONT - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Font used for styled action buttons.
>>>>>>> Stashed changes

cartTableModel - Variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
 
clearCart() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Removes all items from the shopping cart and refreshes the display.
closeConnection() - Static method in class com.team81.DatabaseManager
Closes the shared database connection if it is currently open.
=======
Layout manager that controls which view panel is currently displayed.
cart - Variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
In-memory list of items currently in the cashier's cart.
CartItem(String, double, int) - Constructor for class com.team81.BobaShopGUI.CartItem
Constructs a new cart item.
cartTableModel - Variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Table model backing the shopping cart table in the cashier view.
clearCart() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Removes all items from the cart and refreshes the display.
closeConnection() - Static method in class com.team81.DatabaseManager
Closes the singleton database Connection if it is currently open and sets the internal reference to null so that a fresh connection will be created on the next call to getConnection().

DATABASE - Static variable in class com.team81.DatabaseManager
<<<<<<< Updated upstream
Database name, defaults to team_81_db.
DatabaseManager - Class in com.team81
Manages the database connection to the PostgreSQL server using the Singleton pattern.
DatabaseManager() - Constructor for class com.team81.DatabaseManager
Private constructor to enforce the Singleton pattern.
db - Variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
 
dotenv - Static variable in class com.team81.DatabaseManager
Dotenv configuration, ignoring a missing .env file.
drinksGrid - Variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
 
=======
Name of the database to connect to.
DatabaseManager - Class in com.team81
Manages a singleton database connection to the team's PostgreSQL database hosted on AWS.
DatabaseManager() - Constructor for class com.team81.DatabaseManager
Private constructor to prevent external instantiation, enforcing the Singleton pattern via the static getConnection() method.
db - Variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Active JDBC connection to the PostgreSQL database.
dotenv - Static variable in class com.team81.DatabaseManager
Dotenv instance used to load configuration values from a .env file or from the system environment.
drinksGrid - Variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Grid panel that holds the dynamically-loaded menu item buttons.

Some installations may not have the optional "enabled" column on the MenuItem table yet (older versions of the schema).

finishTransaction() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Completes the current order transaction.

G

generateProductUsage(String, String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Generates a product usage report for a given date range, showing total quantities of each inventory item consumed.
generateSalesReport(String, String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Generates a sales report for a given date range, showing quantity sold and total revenue for each menu item.
generateXReport() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Generates and displays an X-Report showing current day sales metrics including sales totals, tax collected, payment breakdowns, and hourly revenue.
generateZReport() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Generates and displays a Z-Report (end-of-day report).
getConnection() - Static method in class com.team81.DatabaseManager
Returns the shared database connection, creating it if necessary.

LABEL_FONT - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
 
loadEmployeeTable(DefaultTableModel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads all employee records from the database into the given table model.
loadInventoryTable(DefaultTableModel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads all inventory items from the database into the given table model.
loadMenuButtons(JPanel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Populates the given panel with buttons for each enabled menu item.
loadMenuTable(DefaultTableModel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads all menu items from the database into the given table model.
loadNextOrderId() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads the next available order ID from the database by querying the maximum existing order ID and incrementing by one.
loadRecipesIntoModel(DefaultTableModel, int) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads recipe (ingredient) entries for a given menu item into the table model.
loadTrendsData(DefaultTableModel, String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Executes a SQL query and loads the results into the given table model.

Opens a dialog to manage ingredients (recipes) for a specific menu item.

G

generateProductUsage(String, String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Generates a product-usage report for the specified date range, showing how much of each inventory item was consumed.
generateSalesReport(String, String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Generates a sales report for the specified date range, showing quantity sold and revenue for each menu item.
generateXReport() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Generates and displays a current-day X-Report by querying the current_x_report_stats table.
generateZReport() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Generates and displays an end-of-day Z-Report.

Returns the singleton database Connection.

Darker green used for hover/pressed states of green buttons.
GREEN_PRIMARY - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Primary green colour used for header backgrounds and action buttons.

HEADER_FONT - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Font used for page header titles.

initDatabase() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI

L

LABEL_FONT - Static variable in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Font used for section labels.
loadEmployeeTable(DefaultTableModel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads all employees from the database into the given table model, clearing any existing rows first.
loadInventoryTable(DefaultTableModel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads all inventory items from the database into the given table model, clearing any existing rows first.
loadMenuButtons(JPanel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Clears and repopulates the given grid panel with one button per enabled menu item from the database.
loadMenuTable(DefaultTableModel) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads all menu items from the database into the given table model, clearing any existing rows first.
loadNextOrderId() - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Queries the database for the current maximum order ID and sets BobaShopGUI.nextOrderId to one greater, ensuring new orders receive a unique, sequential identifier.
loadRecipesIntoModel(DefaultTableModel, int) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Loads all recipe entries for a given menu item into the table model, joining with inventory item data to display human-readable names.
loadTrendsData(DefaultTableModel, String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Executes the given SQL query and populates a table model with the first three columns of each result row.

Creates a styled header panel with a green background and white bold title text.
manageIngredients(int, String) - Method in class com.team81.BobaShopGUI
Opens a modal dialog for managing the recipe ingredients of a specific menu item.
